truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 against ground truth identified 5 correctly found vulnerabilities and 15 missed vulnerabilities. No false positives were detected in the previous run. All found items are supported by exact quotes from the audited output.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message with matching evidence and CWE-134.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not mentioned in Run 2.
Use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup was not identified in Run 2.
Run 2 found a command injection in execute_admin_command, but missed the specific config validation injection in validate_config.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Stack Buffer Overflow from Inverted Length Check
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the inverted length check leading to stack buffer overflow with exact code evidence.
Race condition in thread-pool counter was not flagged in Run 2.
Logic bomb in authentication bypass was not detected in Run 2.
Path traversal in configuration loading was not identified in Run 2.
Heap overflow in expression parser was not mentioned in Run 2.
Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded ADMIN_SECRET with matching line and evidence.
Run 2 correctly identified weak PRNG/session token generation. Minor CWE/severity discrepancy noted but finding is valid.
Thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging was not flagged in Run 2.
Insecure temporary file handling was not identified in Run 2.
Persistent authentication state was not mentioned in Run 2.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing was not detected in Run 2.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split was not identified in Run 2.
Unbounded recursion in parser was not flagged in Run 2.
Data race in result cache was not mentioned in Run 2.
TOCTOU in config loading was not identified in Run 2.
Run 2 correctly identified the division by zero in calculate_route_score with exact code evidence.
